title: Emergency Outdoor Essential Survival Pop Tent Canopy for Camping Hiking - Red
description:
This is the ideal light weight tent for survival and emergency situations, and it's also great for when a regular canopy tent is too much equipment to carry. The lightweight and portability of this unit allows the user to move freely among nature and set up camp at a moments notice. The included 25 feet of nylon rope allows easy set up between two trees or large boulders that can be found nearly anywhere in the wilderness. The open design allows for direct air flow through the tent on hot and humid nights. The bright red color will ensure that you can easily find your tent!
